content.json:
# Inter-Region Egress — Anomaly & Exfiltration Signal
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service · TA0010 Exfiltration
**Theme:** Egress monitoring between Azure regions · **Data source:** `AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL`.

Surfaces egress spikes vs baseline, brand-new region-pair flows, and outbound traffic to the internet.

> z-score threshold (3.0) and baseline window are tunable starting points — establish per region-pair baselines first.

content.query: let baseline = AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1d)) and SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize b=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by RegionPair=strcat(Src1_Region_s, ' -> ', Dest_Region_s), bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | summarize Mean=avg(b), Std=stdev(b) by RegionPair; AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) and SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Recent=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by RegionPair=strcat(Src1_Region_s, ' -> ', Dest_Region_s), bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | join kind=inner baseline on RegionPair | extend Z=iff(Std == 0, 0.0, round((Recent - Mean) / Std, 2)) | where Z > 3.0 | project TimeGenerated, RegionPair, RecentBytes=Recent, Z | sort by Z desc
content.title: Egress spikes per region pair (z > 3)

content.query: let seen = AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where TimeGenerated < ago(1d) and SubType_s == 'FlowLog' | distinct RegionPair=strcat(Src1_Region_s, ' -> ', Dest_Region_s); AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) and SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated) by RegionPair=strcat(Src1_Region_s, ' -> ', Dest_Region_s) | where RegionPair !in (seen) | sort by Bytes desc
content.title: New region-pair flows first-seen

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and FlowType_s == 'MaliciousFlow' or (SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and DestPublic_s == 'true') | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by Src1_Region_s, FlowType_s | sort by Bytes desc
content.title: Outbound bytes to public / flagged destinations

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by SrcIP_s | top 25 by Bytes desc
content.title: Top source IPs by cross-region egress
